summary: Session query path has hidden mutations that reduce predictability.

findings.evidence: getSessionToken increments refreshCount and mutates cache while presenting a query-like API.
findings.minimal_fix: Split cache refresh into explicit command methods and keep read method side-effect free.
findings.verification: Add tests asserting repeated reads do not change refreshCount or cache content unexpectedly.

findings.evidence: Global SessionCache creates hidden shared state coupling across call sites.
findings.minimal_fix: Inject a cache abstraction per service instance instead of mutating global singleton state.
findings.verification: Run service tests in parallel and confirm no cross-test state contamination.
